zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Anne Clinton於1534年出生在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特時，她的父親Sir Edward Clinton22歲，母親Ursula Stourton16歲。她於1560年與Nicholas Clere在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年6月8日在英國艾可迪德哈姆享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Anne Clinton于1534年出生在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特时，她的父亲Sir Edward Clinton22岁，母亲Ursula Stourton16岁。她于1560年与Nicholas Clere在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年6月8日在英国艾可迪德哈姆享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Anne Clinton was born in 1534, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edward Clinton, was 22 and her mother, Ursula Stourton, was 16. She married Nicholas Clere in 1560, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 June 1584, in Dedham, Essex, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Anne Clinton est née en 1534, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward Clinton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ursula Stourton, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Clere en 1560, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 juin 1584, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Anne Clinton 1534 in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Clinton 22 und ihre Mutter Ursula Stourton 16. Sie hat 1560 in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Clere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. Juni 1584 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Dedham, Essex, England und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Anne Clinton è nata il nel 1534 nel Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Edward Clinton, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Ursula Stourton, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Clere nel 1560, nel Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 8 giugno 1584, nel Dedham, Essex, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Anne Clintonが1534年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Clintonは22歳，母Ursula Stourtonは16歳であった。1560年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターでNicholas Clereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年6月8日にイギリスエセックスデドハムで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Anne Clinton(이)가 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Clinton(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ursula Stourton(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 Nicholas Clere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 6월 8일 영국 에세스 데드함에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Anne Clinton nasceu em 1534, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edward Clinton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Stourton, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Clere em 1560, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de junho de 1584, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Anne Clinton родилась в 1534 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Clinton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ursula Stourton, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Clere в 1560 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 июня 1584 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Anne Clinton nació en 1534, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edward Clinton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Ursula Stourton, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Nicholas Clere en 1560, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de junio de 1584, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
